function.name: business_facts_get
function.description: First call: business profile, IANA timezone, services (with UUIDs), work hours, and optional facts. Use timezone for all scheduling context.

function.name: caller_intake
function.description: Resolve caller phone to client or prospect. Call early in the conversation.

function.name: availability_check
function.description: List open slots for one service. Prefer inclusive business-calendar range_start_date and range_end_date (YYYY-MM-DD). Each window includes slot_id, iso_start, iso_end, speakable_time, speakable_end. Use speakable_time for what you say to the caller.

function.name: appointment_hold
function.description: Hold a slot for 3 minutes. Pass slot_id from the chosen availability window and the same service_id. Then call appointment_confirm with hold_token.

service_id.description: Same service UUID used in availability_check

function.name: appointment_confirm
function.description: Confirm after a successful hold. Requires hold_token from appointment_hold response data.

function.name: appointment_cancel
function.description: Cancel a held or confirmed appointment by appointment_id.

function.name: appointment_reschedule
function.description: Move a confirmed appointment. Prefer new_slot_id from a fresh availability_check for the same service; or new_start_time ISO; or new_start_date + new_start_time_local in business TZ.

new_start_time.description: ISO instant if not using new_slot_id
